title: codereview P4: missing broadcast node validation in info_node_num
description: The function in lichen/subsys/lichen/meshtastic/codec.c:541 does not check for MESHTASTIC_BROADCAST_NODE (0xffffffffU). write_user generates the ID string without additional sanitization. Per task, treat P4 as real work and fix. Discovered-from:project-LICHEN-zmrg
close_reason: Fixed as part of codec update above
